rulesNote: Skill Challenge feats are runtime challenge hooks. They do not modify actor static skill math and must be resolved through GM-confirmed Skill Challenge tracker or review-card actions.

hooks.trigger: A GM-reviewed roll would trigger the Catastrophic Failure challenge effect for the acting hero.
hooks.implementation: GM button reduces the catastrophic result to one accumulated failure and records feat usage on the challenge state.
hooks.automationLimits: The system does not spend resources or force rerolls automatically. The GM confirms the reaction.

hooks.trigger: A GM-reviewed result would reach the challenge failure limit, normally ending the challenge.
hooks.implementation: GM button records the reroll opportunity and feat usage without applying the triggering third failure; the replacement roll is resolved through the normal skill roll path.
hooks.automationLimits: The system does not roll on the player's behalf and does not choose the better result automatically.

hooks.trigger: The active Skill Challenge has at least one accumulated failure and a participant has the feat available.
hooks.implementation: GM tracker button removes one accumulated failure and records feat usage on the challenge state.
hooks.automationLimits: The system does not decide narrative eligibility; the GM applies it when the table agrees it is appropriate.
